title: solidago virgaurea subsp. pinetorum
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. pinetorum, also known as mountain goldenrod, is a subspecies of Solidago virgaurea, a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Solidago virgaurea subsp. pinetorum include its ability to act as an anticoagulant, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Solidago virgaurea subsp. pinetorum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
